zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Balliol於1200年出生在英國諾圖波藍德白維爾時，她的父親Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell9歲，母親Cecily de Fontaines21歲。她於1215年與John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta在英國英格蘭達勒姆巴納德 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年7月29日在英國越可爾斯托可斯利享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de Balliol于1200年出生在英国諾圖波藍德白維爾时，她的父亲Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell9岁，母亲Cecily de Fontaines21岁。她于1215年与John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta在英国英格兰達勒姆巴納德 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1251年7月29日在英国越可爾斯托可斯利享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Balliol was born in 1200, in Bywell, Northumberland, England, her father, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, was 9 and her mother, Cecily de Fontaines, was 21. She married John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta in 1215, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 July 1251, in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Balliol est née en 1200, à Bywell, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Fontaines, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta en 1215, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1251, à Stokesley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.Barnard Castle, County Durham, England: Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Balliol 1200 in Bywell, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell 9 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Fontaines 21. Sie hat 1215 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1251 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Balliol è nata il nel 1200 nel Bywell, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Fontaines, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta nel 1215, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 luglio 1251, nel Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Balliolが1200年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブイウエルで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywellは9歳，母Cecily de Fontainesは21歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルでJohn Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Cartaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1251年7月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Balliol(이)가 1200년 영국 노르스벌랜드 비웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Fontaines(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 7월 29일 영국 요르크실르 스토케슬리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Balliol nasceu em 1200, em Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Fontaines, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta em 1215, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1251, em Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Balliol родилась в 1200 г. в местности бивелл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Fontaines, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta в 1215 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 июля 1251 г. в местности стокесли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

Se casó con John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta en 1215, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de julio de 1251, en Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
